strings.SECONDARY_FAULT_LINE_DESCRIPTION: <style=cIsDamage>Fractio</style>. Crea lineam rimae quae frangitur, inferens 700% damni.
strings.SPECIAL_RECURSION_DESCRIPTION: Reproduc rimam, eam post breve intervallum iterum resonare faciens.
strings.BLAKE_RIFTER_PASSIVE_RIFT_FRACTURE_DESCR: Hostes a rimis percussi franguntur, augendo damnum inflictum.
strings.PASSIVE_RIFT_BOOST_DESCRIPTION: Rimae tuae celeritatem motus donant dum per eas transis.
strings.BLAKE_RIFTER_UTILITY_SLIPSTREAM_DESCRIPT: Teleporta ad parvam distantiam. Facultatis secundariae copiam restituit.
strings.UTILITY_CHAINED_WORLDS_DESCRIPTION: Coniunge duos locos in spatio, creando portam quae proiectilia transportat.
strings.BLAKE_RIFTER_UTILITY_CHAINED_WORLDS_DESC: Coniunge duos locos in spatio, creando portam quae proiectilia transportat.
strings.BLAKE_RIFTER_OUTRO_FLAVOR: ..et sic mundum fissum post se reliquit.
strings.UTILITY_QUANTUM_RIFT_DESCRIPTION: Aperi rimam quanticam quae spatium circumiacens distorquet.
strings.BLAKE_RIFTER_PASSIVE_RIFT_BOOST_DESCRIPT: Rimae tuae celeritatem motus donant dum per eas transis.
strings.BLAKE_RIFTER_SPECIAL_TIMELOCK_DESCRIPTIO: Tempus hostium in area fixa, eos per aliquot secunda gelans.
strings.BLAKE_RIFTER_SECONDARY_FAULT_LINE_DESCRI: <style=cIsDamage>Fractio</style>. Crea lineam rimae quae frangitur, inferens 700% damni.
strings.SECONDARY_FRACTURE_DESCRIPTION: <style=cIsDamage>Fractio</style>. Iaculare rimam distantem, inferens 75% damni, usque 5 fragmenta.
strings.ACHIEVEMENT_BLAKE_RIFTER_BUCKSHOT_ACHIEV: Teleport 10 or more enemies at once!
strings.BLAKE_RIFTER_DESCRIPTION: Rimator positione strategica utitur ad rimas destructivas in realitate creandas.
